channel.title: Early Reading Tools — Free Phonics & Sight Word Resources for Parents on Early Reading Tools
channel.description: Recent content in Early Reading Tools — Free Phonics & Sight Word Resources for Parents on Early Reading Tools

item.title: The Free Phonics Starter Kit: Everything You Need to Begin
item.description: A complete, step-by-step phonics starter kit for parents — letter sounds, blending, short vowels, and your first 30 lessons. Free and printable.

item.title: Hooked on Phonics Review 2025: Does It Actually Work?
item.description: Honest Hooked on Phonics review: curriculum, pros and cons, pricing, and the $1 trial explained. Ages 3–8.

item.title: Letter Recognition Activities: 12 Ways to Help Kids Learn the Alphabet Fast
item.description: 12 hands-on letter recognition activities for preschoolers and kindergarteners — fun, multisensory games to help kids learn to identify all 26 letters quickly.

item.title: 10 Sight Word Games Kids Actually Love (That Secretly Teach Reading)
item.description: The best sight word games for kids ages 4–8 — fun, low-prep activities that build automatic word recognition without boring flashcard drills.

item.title: Fry Sight Words: The Complete 1,000-Word List by Level (Free Printable)
item.description: The complete Fry sight word list — all 1,000 words organized into 10 levels, with teaching strategies, flashcard tips, and free printables.

item.title: Best Phonics Apps for Kids in 2025 (Tested by Real Parents)
item.description: Honest reviews of the best phonics apps for kids — Phonics Hero, Reading Eggs, Starfall, Khan Academy Kids, and more. Ages 3–8.

item.title: The Complete Phonics Roadmap: Every Skill in Order (Pre-K Through Grade 3)
item.description: A complete phonics roadmap showing every skill to teach in order — from phonemic awareness through advanced multisyllabic words. Includes milestone checklist.

item.title: Reading Readiness: 10 Signs Your Child Is Ready to Learn to Read
item.description: Learn the 10 signs of reading readiness in children ages 3–6, and what to do if your child isn't showing them yet. When to start phonics instruction.

item.title: 15 Phonics Activities Kids Actually Want to Do (No Worksheets Required)
item.description: Fun, hands-on phonics activities for kids ages 4–7 — letter sound games, blending exercises, word-building activities, and more. No boring worksheets.

item.title: Best Books for Beginning Readers: A Leveled Book List by Stage
item.description: A curated list of the best books for beginning readers — organized by reading stage, from first decodable books through early chapter books.

item.title: Best Phonics Programs for Beginning Readers in 2025 (Honest Reviews)
item.description: Honest reviews of the top phonics programs for beginners — comparing All About Reading, Explode the Code, Bob Books, Reading Eggs, and more.

item.title: Dolch Sight Word List: Complete 220 Words by Grade Level (Free Printable)
item.description: The complete Dolch sight word list — all 220 words organized by grade level from Pre-K through Grade 3, plus 95 nouns. Free printable PDF included.

item.title: How to Teach Your Child to Read at Home: A Step-by-Step Parent's Guide
item.description: A complete guide for parents on how to teach a child to read — covering phonemic awareness, phonics, sight words, fluency, and comprehension in the right order.

item.title: Start Here: Find the Right Guide for Your Child
item.description: New to Early Reading Tools? This page routes you to the right resources based on where your child is right now — from alphabet to fluent reading.

item.title: About Early Reading Tools
item.description: Why we built Early Reading Tools and who it's for — a free resource for parents who want to give their children the gift of reading.

item.title: Affiliate Disclosure
item.description:
Early Reading Tools participates in affiliate marketing programs. Some links on this website are affiliate links — we may receive a commission if you click and make a purchase, at no additional cost to you.

We are a participant in the Amazon Services LLC Associates Program. Our editorial content is not influenced by affiliate relationships. We only recommend products we genuinely believe in.

Questions: hello@earlyreadingtools.com

Last updated: January 2025

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Last updated: January 2025

Early Reading Tools (“we”) collects limited information when you visit earlyreadingtools.com: device/browser data via Google Analytics, and your email address if you subscribe to our newsletter.

We use this information to improve the site and send newsletters (with consent). We do not sell your data. You can unsubscribe from emails at any time.

We use affiliate marketing cookies (Amazon Associates and others). Children under 13: we do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. This site is intended for adult parents and educators.
